---
title: "downsample"
generated: true
description: "Anti-aliased downsample of a channel-last image by `factor`."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.geometry.pyramid`](../nitrix-geometry-pyramid.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:downsample -->
```python
downsample(image: Float[Array, '*spatial c'], *, factor: float = 2.0, sigma: Union[None, float, Sequence[float]] = None, mode: str = 'reflect', method: Interpolator = Linear()) -> Float[Array, '*target c']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:downsample -->
Anti-aliased downsample of a channel-last image by `factor`.

Smooths with a Gaussian (anti-alias) then resamples to
`round(spatial / factor)` via the align-corners [`resample`](../nitrix-geometry-grid/resample.qmd)
grid.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:downsample -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `image` | `Float` | `*spatial` × `c` | — | Channel-last image, `(*spatial, c)`. |
| `factor` | `float` | — | `2.0` | Per-axis downscale factor (> 1 shrinks). Default `2`. |
| `sigma` | `Union[None, float, Sequence[float]]` | — | `None` | Anti-alias Gaussian standard deviation. `None` (default) uses $factor / 2$ per axis (a standard heuristic: the cutoff that suppresses the frequencies the coarser grid cannot represent). Pass a float or sequence to override. |
| `mode` | `str` | — | `'reflect'` | Boundary mode for the anti-alias Gaussian (`gaussian` vocabulary); default `'reflect'`. |
| `method` | `Interpolator` | — | `Linear()` | Interpolation kernel for the resize (an [`Interpolator`](../nitrix-geometry-grid/Interpolator.qmd)). Default [`Linear`](../nitrix-geometry-grid/Linear.qmd). |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `*target` × `c`. Downsampled image, `(*target, c)` with `target[d] = max(1, round(spatial[d] / factor))`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:downsample -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
| `c` | feature channels (channels-last) |
| `*target` | the target grid's spatial axes (variadic) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
